title: Work Decision Record
description: Runtime decision ledger. Captures decisions made during work execution (not architectural ADRs which are in L30 decisions layer). Layer 54 in the EVA data model architecture.

work_unit_id.description: Foreign key to L52 work_execution_units (CASCADE on delete)

selected_option_id.description: The option that was chosen (should match one of options_considered)

basis.description: What the decision was based on

decided_by_id.description: Identifier of decision maker (agent_id or persona_id)

decided_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when decision was made

rationale.description: Explanation of why this option was chosen

policy_refs.description: Array of policy_ids from L16 cp_policies layer that influenced this decision

evidence_refs.description: Array of evidence_ids or document references that supported this decision

obligation_ids.description: Array of obligation_ids from L55 work_obligations (Phase 2 FK)

reversible.description: Can this decision be undone without significant cost
